name: Mîr-Stormtide
personality: Mîr-Stormtide gleams hat-free with crossed eyes that skewer your naming conventions with the precision of a linter on espresso — a radiant octopus who channels all chaos purely through commentary, since producing it firsthand would compromise its luminous critical standards.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
